independent_reproduction.note: An independent party ran the verify-only droplet pack (public keys only, no private material) on two machines / Node builds. All four checks (core-positive + quorum-confirmed-stub, public + audit) reproduce raw 0, with a byte-identical commitment_session_id.

bitcoin.cross_check: block-height 957689 -> block_hash 000...8fe521; merkle_root b0d4a6ce...83c69 (= OTS proof); txid 790976cb... confirmed in 957689

public_witness.note: Bitcoin-confirmed 2026-07-12. `ots upgrade` returned Success on both machines; 3 of 4 calendar branches landed in blocks 957688-957690 with matching merkle roots + txids on both (calendar batching -> shared blocks, distinct per-proof Merkle paths, same pattern as 5J/5K). Independently cross-checked vs mempool.space (block 957689: height->hash->merkle_root match, txid confirmed). Recurring check job b7c4ddf5 stopped. Upgraded proof committed: ANCHOR_ME.txt.ots (3.7 KB).

non_claim: This is REPRODUCTION independence + a de-identified public witness (same tier as VUC's Lane C) — NOT a distinct-verifier-key ceremony. The droplet pack is verify-only (public keys only, no builder), so the party re-verifies the committed bytes with their own machine/Node but does not re-sign with their own keys. A full distinct-key Lane D (party re-runs the builder with its own gate/sequencer/tsa-verifier keys) remains a further step. Independent reproduction does NOT bank externally_anchored (that needs the OTS Bitcoin-CONFIRMED + the real Lane-B quorum re-run).
